summary: Critical gaps prevent execution: missing package.json (bun install fails), fixtures/test-secrets.json (workflow cannot run), and test files for bun test. TypeScript code lacks defensive checks—no null guards in rotationCheck.ts, empty array validation missing, Date JSON serialization implicit. Workflow hard-codes fixture expectations (1 expired, 0 warning, 2 ok) without documenting fixture schema. Verification steps repeat similar jq patterns (lines 36, 44, 50). Good modular structure (types, formatters, cli separation) and clear error messages in src/index.ts catch-block, but incomplete error propagation throughout modules.
